summary: Find a magnetic-field-aligned NV from image145844, then obtain a well-supported T2star and 13C conclusion.

human_request_preview: Objective: Find a magnetic-field-aligned NV from image145844, then obtain a well-supported T2star and 13C conclusion. Start a project using the spatial range of <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\SavedImages\3DXYZ-Image-2026-05-13-145844.mat as the initial search region. Identify an NV aligned to the magnetic field within that image range; if none is found, search different regions. Judge magnetic-field alignment using a strong-pi pulsed ODMR scan; if it does not show a clear usable resonance, reject

Use the Memory Index to read relevant sections from NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE.md only as needed. Read .manager/evidence.jsonl, project policy, detailed backlog entries, and directly relevant evidence only as needed, then use the same-wake runnable work loop to complete, update, or queue all currently runnable safe project work until a real stop condition is reached. Python should stay limited to state, queue safety, audit logs, and hard boundaries; the agent should own the scientific plan. Process advice inbox messages with list-advice-inbox/dispose-advice when present, record evidence, update backlog, write work/state.md, log.md, and work/notes files as useful, update NV_RESEARCH_KNOWLEDGE.md for reusable detailed lessons, and write the completion marker.
next_action.reason: execution queue is empty; wake the agent to synthesize or update the research agenda and advance all currently runnable safe project work from objective, evidence, human advice, and safety policy

recent_evidence.summary: TrackCenter completed for the top fresh re-image seed image145844_reimage_r01. Final counts 38.971 kcps at tracked position [114.531351,117.705596,116.283685] um; selected z attempt 1; no tracker abort.

Strong-pi pODMR completed for freshly tracked image145844_reimage_r01; savedexperiment 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-mw_freq-2026-05-13-160024.mat, 2 averages x 40000 repetitions, final counts text 24.098 kcps. Raw/readout review required before resonance decision.

Raw/readout-aware review of image145844_reimage_r01 strong-pi pODMR: no clear usable resonance supported. Signal variations are comparable to drift/baseline/average changes; both averages drift-flagged; descriptive Lorentzian dip fit has poor R2 about 0.20. Do not use this candidate for T2star; move to next fresh re-image seed.

TrackCenter completed for second fresh re-image seed image145844_reimage_r02. Final counts 39.367 kcps at tracked position [115.864332,117.919934,116.274661] um; selected z attempt 1; no tracker abort.

Started r02 strong-pi pODMR after fresh TrackCenter. Uses 4 averages x 20000 repetitions to keep per-average windows below daytime cap after r01 drift flags; running job blocks further bridge submissions.
